title: Learning Fast, Learning Slow: A General Continual Learning Method based on Complementary Learning System

methodology.problem: Catastrophic forgetting in deep neural networks during continual learning

approaches.description: Dedicate distinct set of network parameters to distinct tasks
Maintain a memory buffer and replay samples from previous tasks
approaches.effectiveness: Proven more effective in challenging CL tasks

methodology.inspiration: Complementary Learning Systems (CLS) theory in the brain

components.name: Semantic memories
components.function: Build short-term and long-term memories of learned representations
components.implementation: Exponential moving average of working model's weights with varying time windows and frequencies

mechanism.interaction: Extract consolidated replay activation patterns and enforce a consistency loss on the update of the working model to prevent rapid changes and align decision boundary
